case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. JASON AKERS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AKERS, JASON $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
